title: Load Tactical Puzzle
description: An early-game crossroads for the Titans of Ul: a contested wormhole nexus, a vulnerable enemy carrier, and a tempo decision worth a full round of board position. Loads the board, selects the faction, and shows a saved recommendation.
puzzle: It is the end of Round 1. Your Titans fleet (1 cruiser, 1 carrier with 2 infantry, 2 fighters) sits in your home system. A neighbor has over-extended a lone carrier with 1 fighter into the system between you and Mecatol Rex, and the adjacent Beta wormhole system is still empty. You have Antimass Deflectors and 3 command tokens in your tactic pool. What is the strongest move?
